faqs.question: How We Disclose Your Personal Information

content.title: Your Privacy Choices
mainPoints: U.S. state privacy laws give consumers the right to opt out of targeted advertising (called “sharing” under California’s privacy law, the CCPA) and any practices that may be considered a “sale” of personal information. To learn more about our data practices and your privacy rights, please read our privacy policy.

We use the Global Privacy Platform (GPP) mechanism to communicate your Request to Opt-Out to third parties that collect information via cookies on our website. If you choose, you may also use the Digital Advertising Alliance (DAA) WebChoices Tool to globally opt-out of third-party tracking via website cookies.
content.additional: Please note that online opt-outs are device and browser-specific. You may still see personalized ads from us while using a different device or browser, unless you also opt-out using that device or browser.
